hero.title: Transform your fitness journey with
hero.subtitle: Track workouts, monitor progress, and achieve your fitness goals with our comprehensive platform designed for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.
hero.benefits: No credit card required • Free forever • Cancel anytime

features.title: Everything you need to succeed
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed to help you track, analyze, and optimize your fitness journey.

workoutLogging.title: Workout Logging
workoutLogging.description: Track every rep, set, and exercise with our intuitive logging system. Build custom routines and monitor your progress over time.

progressAnalytics.title: Progress Analytics
progressAnalytics.description: Visualize your fitness journey with detailed charts and insights. See your strength gains, volume trends, and performance metrics.

nutritionTracking.title: Nutrition Tracking
nutritionTracking.description: Monitor your macros and calories to fuel your workouts. Set nutrition goals and track your daily intake effortlessly.

performanceMetrics.title: Performance Metrics
performanceMetrics.description: Track key performance indicators like one-rep max, volume load, and training frequency to optimize your results.

goalSetting.title: Goal Setting
goalSetting.description: Set SMART fitness goals and track your progress. Get motivated with milestone celebrations and achievement badges.

communitySupport.title: Community Support
communitySupport.description: Connect with like-minded fitness enthusiasts. Share your progress, get inspired, and stay accountable together.

cta.title: Ready to start your fitness journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of athletes and fitness enthusiasts who trust FitHub to track their progress and achieve their goals.
